title: DarkerBiome Zombies
description: Zombies per biome, from DarkerStory server RPG, optifine needed
body:
## DarkerBiome Zombies ### Optifine is needed in order for this pack to work! ![Darker Biome Zombies banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c759daa2a3a5372c3410edf2f28ed608bfce0de8.png)
9 Zombies variants per biomes, from my server rpg DarkerStory.
Will be updated in the future.

**Español:** 9 Variantes de zombis por biomas, de mi servidor de minecraft RPG DarkerStory

Puedes jugar con estos zombis y su modelo y habilidades originales en mi servidor:
![Darkerstory banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29ca768abfcfef286748058ede673f65f28da1e1.png)
**Discord del servidor:**
[https://discord.gg/MF4tNYqvPv](https://discord.gg/MF4tNYqvPv)
